allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const m=html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if\(m\){try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('JS syntax OK'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('SYNTAX ERROR:',e.message\)}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const m=html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if\(m\){try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('JS syntax OK'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('Syntax error:',e.message\)}}")
